## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Browser:** e.g. Chrome 124
- **OS:** e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11
- **Webcam:** e.g. built-in / external
- **Screen resolution:**

## Console Errors
Paste any errors from DevTools → Console here.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording
If applicable, add screenshots or a short recording.
